LanguageData.RobCo_Liberator.label: Liberator
LanguageData.RobCo_Liberator.description: A small quadrupedal combat robot associated with Chinese-aligned factions in the Commonwealth. It is built around a single integrated laser weapon and four mechanical legs for rapid movement over uneven terrain. The Liberator is lightly armored but fast, and is typically encountered in large groups that attack simultaneously from multiple directions.
